storyHook: 描述哪里痛，医生给建议，回家休息吃药

narrative.when: 周一上午，症状从昨晚开始加重
narrative.how: 挂号后坐在诊室，如实描述感受
narrative.method: 说哪里痛、多久了、是否发烧，听医嘱吃药休息
narrative.event: 甲喉咙痛还咳嗽，担心明天重要会议，想知道几天能好

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning, doctor. My voice is rough.
turns.zh: 医生早。我嗓子哑了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good morning. Have a seat. When did this start?
turns.zh: 早，请坐。什么时候开始的？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Last night, after I went to bed. It got worse this morning.
turns.zh: 昨晚躺下后，今早更严重了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any pain in the throat? Or a cough?
turns.zh: 喉咙痛吗？咳嗽不？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is hard when I take food down. And I cough a good bit.
turns.zh: 是的，咽东西难受，还咳得厉害。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me have a look. Open your mouth wide.
turns.zh: 让我瞧瞧。张大嘴。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ah... It's red inside. No high heat?
turns.zh: 啊……里面很红。没发烧吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am not certain. I am warm, but I have not taken a measure.
turns.zh: 应该没有。身上热，但没量过。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is all right. It is a common pain in the throat. Rest and take water.
turns.zh: 那就好。普通喉咙痛，多喝水休息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have an important meeting tomorrow. Will I be better by then?
turns.zh: 明天有个重要会议，能好吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would not say for certain. But with rest, you will be much better.
turns.zh: 不好说。但休息好，会好很多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. So I can still go to the meeting if I rest today?
turns.zh: 明白。那我今天休息，明天能去开会吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: If you rest and have water, yes. But no talking.
turns.zh: 如果休息喝水，可以。但别说话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will keep quiet. What about a thing for the pain?
turns.zh: 好的。我少说话。来点止痛的东西吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take one after food, two times a day.
turns.zh: 饭后吃，一天两次。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will get that. How long till I am better?
turns.zh: 好，我去拿。大概多久能好？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three to five days. You will be better in two.
turns.zh: 三到五天。两天内就会好转。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two days. That is not bad. I will rest today.
turns.zh: 两天，还行。我今天休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Keep warm and drink water. No cold drinks.
turns.zh: 好。注意保暖，多喝水。别喝冷的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No cold drinks. Got it. What about food?
turns.zh: 不喝冷的，记住了。吃的呢？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Soft food is best. Soup, rice, bread. Nothing sharp.
turns.zh: 软食最好。汤、粥、面包。别吃辣的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get some soup on the way back.
turns.zh: 我回家路上买点汤。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea. And take the thing after food.
turns.zh: 好主意。药记得饭后吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Thank you, you have been a great help.
turns.zh: 好的。谢谢，帮了大忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are welcome. be safe. okay if needed.
turns.zh: 不客气。安全第一，有事再来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, i will. Thank you, you have been a great help.
turns.zh: 我会的。谢谢你，帮了大忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No problem at all.
turns.zh: 不客气。安全第一，需要时好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get the thing now. sure.
turns.zh: 我现在去拿东西。好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. get some rest.
turns.zh: 好的。休息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope I can be better by tomorrow.
turns.zh: 希望明天能好点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do not push. Rest is best.
turns.zh: 别硬撑。休息是最好的药。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are right. I will take the day off.
turns.zh: 你说得对。我下午请假。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Keep drinking warm water.
turns.zh: 好。记得多喝温水。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will keep a bottle near me.
turns.zh: 嗯。我放一瓶水在身边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the way. Now go and get some rest.
turns.zh: 这就对了。快去休息吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get some fruit and soup on the way back.
turns.zh: 我回家路上买点水果和粥。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. Soft food is best for your throat.
turns.zh: 好主意。软的食物对你喉咙最好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take it after the meal.
turns.zh: 我吃完饭就吃。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do that. Two times a day, after food.
turns.zh: 就这样。一天两次，饭后吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I am better now.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我现在好多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now, about your work tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好。那说说你明天的工作。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have a key meeting at ten. I have to be there.
turns.zh: 我十点有个重要会议。我必须去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Can you make it through the meeting without talking much?
turns.zh: 你能撑过会议，少说话吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will have a go. But my voice is rough.
turns.zh: 我试试。但我声音都哑了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put a glass of water on the table. Take small drinks.
turns.zh: 桌上放杯水。小口喝。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. I will do that.
turns.zh: 好主意。我会照做。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And if you cough, cover your mouth.
turns.zh: 如果咳嗽，捂住嘴。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite right. I would not make a person ill.
turns.zh: 没错。我不想传染别人。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are a good man. Now go and get your rest.
turns.zh: 你是个好人。快去休息吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I will keep your words in mind.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我会记住你的话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Here is your note for work.
turns.zh: 好了。这是你的病假条。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, you have one ready. That is kind.
turns.zh: 哦，你已经准备好了。真好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take it to your office. Two days rest is best.
turns.zh: 拿去公司。休息两天最好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two days? But my meeting is tomorrow.
turns.zh: 两天？可我明天有会。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. But your body needs rest, not work.
turns.zh: 我明白。但你的身体需要休息，不是工作。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What if I just go for the meeting and come back?
turns.zh: 如果我只去开会，然后回来呢？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That may make it worse.
turns.zh: 那可能会加重病情。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have to give a talk. No one other can.
turns.zh: 我必须发言。没别人能替。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then keep it short. Drink water. No loud talk.
turns.zh: 那就简短些。多喝水。别大声说话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. I will be quick.
turns.zh: 有道理。我尽量快点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep my voice low.
turns.zh: 我会压低声音。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now about the thing for the disease.
turns.zh: 好的。现在说治病的那个东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, please say what to take.
turns.zh: 好，请告诉我吃什么药。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is a list. One for the throat, one for the cough.
turns.zh: 这儿有个单子。一种治喉咙，一种治咳嗽。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do I take them after food?
turns.zh: 是饭后吃吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, with a full glass of water.
turns.zh: 对，用一大杯水送服。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And no cold drinks, is that right?
turns.zh: 还有不能喝冷饮，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Warm water only. And rest your voice.
turns.zh: 没错。只喝温水。还有让嗓子休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: If it gets worse, come back?
turns.zh: 如果加重了要回来吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: If you have a high heat, yes. But two days rest will do.
turns.zh: 如果发高烧就来。不过休息两天应该就好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about work? I have a meeting tomorrow.
turns.zh: 那工作怎么办？我明天有个会。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Say no if you can. Your voice needs rest.
turns.zh: 能推就推掉。你的嗓子需要休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I can't. It's important. Can I keep my voice down?
turns.zh: 不行，很重要的会。我能小声说吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Even a soft voice is hard on the throat. Put it down.
turns.zh: 即使小声说话也伤喉咙。记下来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put it on paper? That's old school.
turns.zh: 写在纸上？那也太老派了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Or put words on your small box. Let them see it.
turns.zh: 或者在小盒子上打字。让他们看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I'll give it a go.
turns.zh: 好吧。我试试看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have warm sweet water between talks.
turns.zh: 说话间隙喝点温甜水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sweet? I have some at the house. Good idea.
turns.zh: 蜂蜜？家里有。好主意。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Now go get the thing and rest.
turns.zh: 好了。现在去取药，然后休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I'll do that. Thanks, sir.
turns.zh: 我会照做。谢谢您。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One more thing. How long till I'm better?
turns.zh: 还有一件事。多久能好？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three or four days. Rest is key.
turns.zh: 三四天吧。休息是关键。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So I will be well by day five?
turns.zh: 那我到第五天能好吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: If you rest now, yes. No short cuts.
turns.zh: 现在休息的话，可以。没有捷径。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I'll take the afternoon off. Sleep it off.
turns.zh: 我下午请假。睡一觉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good man. And drink warm water, not cold.
turns.zh: 好。喝温水，别喝凉的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. No cold drinks. I'll get some sweet things too.
turns.zh: 好的。不喝凉的。我也买点甜的东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Off you go. Get the thing from the store.
turns.zh: 好的。去吧。去店里取东西。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you, sir. I'll be good.
turns.zh: 谢谢先生。我会好好休息的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will get the thing from the store now.
turns.zh: 好的。我现在去店里取药。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take it after a meal, two times a day.
turns.zh: 饭后服用，每日两次。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Two times a day. Got it. No work today?
turns.zh: 一天两次。记住了。今天不用上班吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No work. Rest is best for you.
turns.zh: 不用上班。休息对你最好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send a note to the man who is responsible.
turns.zh: 我会给负责人发个消息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Keep warm and rest up.
turns.zh: 好。保暖，好好睡觉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Thanks again.
turns.zh: 我会的。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. be safe.
turns.zh: 不客气。照顾好自己。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. okay if it gets worse.
turns.zh: 我会的。如果加重了再来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. But I hope not. Off you go.
turns.zh: 好。但希望不会。去吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I'll get the thing now.
turns.zh: 好。我现在去拿药。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The store for medicines is down the long room, on your left.
turns.zh: 药店在大房间那头，左手边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I will get it.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我能拿到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep to warm drinks, no cold food.
turns.zh: 只喝热的，别吃凉的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Warm drinks, yes. I'll get some tea.
turns.zh: 喝热的，好的。我去买点茶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Get better quick.
turns.zh: 很好。早日康复。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you, sir. sure.
turns.zh: 谢谢你，先生。好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Goodbye. Take care.
turns.zh: 再见。保重。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. And thanks for your help.
turns.zh: 我会的。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not at all. Now off you go.
turns.zh: 别客气。快去吧。

storyBlurb: 甲喉咙痛咳嗽加重，担心明天会议，赶紧去诊所。医生检查后开药，叮嘱多休息，甲安心回家休养。
storyScript: 【收束·回家休养】甲道谢后离开诊室，去药房取药。回家路上买了些水果和粥，准备按医嘱休养。虽然喉咙还痛，但心里踏实了——明天会议只能硬撑，但至少知道不是大病。他决定下午请假，好好睡一觉。
